name: Ambient
description: Slow generative canvas visuals for late evening — pure CSS/Canvas, no network. Six palettes, optional clock overlay.

theme.description: Color scheme. Midnight is recommended for dim rooms.

font_family.description: Typeface for the optional clock overlay.

accent_color.description: Tint the brightest blob layer. Leave empty to use the palette default.

palette.description: Generative color palette for the canvas blobs.

motion_speed.description: How quickly the blobs drift across the screen.

show_clock.description: Show a centered HH:MM clock overlay.

clock_style.description: Visual style of the clock overlay when show_clock is enabled.
